info.name: CMS API
info.description: Postman collection for the Content Management System API. Use the `baseUrl` and `authToken` variables to target different environments and authenticated endpoints.

request.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT.

response.name: 200 OK
200 OK

request.description: Creates a new content entry (auth required).

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Updates an existing content entry (auth required).

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Uploads metadata for a media asset (auth required).
Updates metadata for a media asset (auth required).
Returns comments for a specific content item (public).
Returns tags linked to a content item (public).
Retrieves a specific content-to-tag association (Admin only).
Creates a new content-to-tag mapping (Admin only).
